The Classic Smash Burger

4.6(200 reviews)
15–25 min
Collection only

Two hand-smashed beef patties (100% British beef), double American cheese, crispy pickled jalapeños, shredded iceberg, beef-dripping mayo and our signature smoky sauce — all stacked in a toasted brioche bun.

🔥680 kcal
🥩42g protein
⚡No added MSG
£11.49£13.99Save £2.50

James OkaforVerified
8 Apr 2026

Genuinely the best smash burger I've had for collection. The brioche bun held up perfectly and the beef dripping mayo is absolutely incredible. Ordered with extra jalapeños — highly recommend.

Great flavourFast collection
Helpful?
Sophie MarchettiVerified
5 Apr 2026

Ordered the XL size with smashed avocado and extra cheese. Ready for pickup in under 20 minutes. The customisation options are brilliant — feels like a proper restaurant experience.

Worth the priceReady on time
Helpful?
Priya NairVerified
1 Apr 2026

Really tasty burger. Went for the Hot spice level and it had a proper kick without being overwhelming. Knocked one star off only because the fries were slightly cold, but the burger itself was 10/10.

Good spice level
Helpful?
Tom WhitfieldVerified
28 Mar 2026

Third time ordering this. Consistent quality every single time. The crispy bacon add-on is a must. SpeedyBites has nailed the smash burger game.

Consistent qualityRepeat order
